title: General Provisions

sections.title: Section 1-1 Purpose
sections.excerpt: The purpose of this ordinance is to promote health, safety, and general welfare by regulating land use and development.

sections.title: Section 1-2 Authority
sections.excerpt: This ordinance is adopted under state enabling legislation and local charter authority.

sections.title: Section 1-3 Definitions
sections.excerpt: Key terms used throughout the ordinance are defined in this section. Subsection 1-3.A Applicability {#section-1-3-a} Definitions apply to all articles unless otherwise stated.
